overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a first-person perspective running along a winding mountain highway. The scene features vehicles with headlights and taillights, crashed cars on the roadside, and rocky cliffs under a dark sky.

agents.ego_description: running along the right shoulder of the mountain highway following the road's curve

notable_agents.action: vehicle traveling ahead with red taillights visible in the distance

entered.detail: tall concrete safety barrier with red brick capping along the left side of the road
steep rocky mountainside with sparse vegetation rising on the right
tall evergreen trees visible behind the concrete barrier
paved asphalt highway surface with lane markings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark mountain highway at night, with the camera running along the right shoulder. A concrete barrier lines the left side while a rocky cliff rises on the right. Distant vehicle taillights are visible ahead on the winding road.

events.description: dark sedan overtakes the camera on the right shoulder
road surface becomes brighter and more visible as camera moves into illuminated section
oncoming SUV with bright headlights passes closely by on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the highway shoulder while traffic passes by in both directions

notable_agents.action: silver sedan overtaking the camera on the right shoulder
oncoming SUV approaching with bright white headlights

segments.scene_description: This segment features active traffic on the mountain highway. A car overtakes the camera on the right, followed by a lighting change that brightens the road surface. An oncoming SUV with bright headlights then passes very closely by on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain road with metal guardrail

events.description: camera passes a white sedan parked on the right shoulder

agents.ego_description: running along the winding road past parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: white sedan parked stationary on the right shoulder

entered.detail: metal guardrail posts replacing the concrete barrier along the left edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the winding mountain road where the concrete barrier gives way to metal guardrail posts. The camera passes a white sedan parked on the right shoulder as the road curves ahead into the darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a dark mountain highway that transitions from a desolate roadside run into a high-traffic encounter before returning to a quiet, winding road. It begins on the right shoulder between a concrete barrier and a towering rocky cliff, moving toward the distant glow of vehicle taillights. As the camera progresses, the road surface brightens and the environment becomes chaotic when a car overtakes from the right, followed immediately by an oncoming SUV with blinding headlights passing in close proximity. The scene then shifts back to a steadier pace as the concrete barrier gives way to metal guardrail posts. Finally, the camera passes a white sedan parked on the shoulder before the road curves away into the surrounding darkness.
